notes: Pass A: 23 pip-audit findings analyzed for reachability through NBI code paths.

All were either: out-of-scope packages (litellm, anthropic, openai, ollama), not imported by NBI, dev/build tools only, already pinned in pyproject.toml, or had no defensible attack path through NBI's actual usage.
Node audit: 8 moderate-severity findings, all in transitive dev dependencies (js-yaml DoS via jest). No production dependency vulnerabilities.
pyproject.toml already addresses CVE-2026-42203, CVE-2026-42208, CVE-2026-42271, CVE-2026-40217, CVE-2026-33441, CVE-2026-42561, CVE-2026-44431, CVE-2026-44432 via version pins.
cryptography CVEs (6 total) target PKCS12/RSA/X.509/ECDSA/ECDH/ASN.1/PKCS7 — NBI only uses Fernet (AES+HMAC+PBKDF2), none reachable.
